```{r}
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_eu_efficacy_understand {#sec-trust-q-eu-efficacy-understand}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-eu-efficacy-understand
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_eu_efficacy_understand (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_eu_efficacy_understand"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_pop_reps {#sec-trust-q-pop-reps}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-pop-reps
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_pop_reps (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_pop_reps"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_pop_goodevil {#sec-trust-q-pop-goodevil}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-pop-goodevil
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_pop_goodevil (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_pop_goodevil"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_pop_compromise {#sec-trust-q-pop-compromise}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-pop-compromise
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_pop_compromise (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_pop_compromise"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_dem_compromise {#sec-trust-q-dem-compromise}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-dem-compromise
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_dem_compromise (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_dem_compromise"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_dem_listen {#sec-trust-q-dem-listen}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-dem-listen
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_dem_listen (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_dem_listen"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_tech_experts {#sec-trust-q-tech-experts}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-tech-experts
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_tech_experts (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_tech_experts"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_tech_leaders {#sec-trust-q-tech-leaders}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-tech-leaders
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_tech_leaders (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_tech_leaders"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_party_harm {#sec-trust-q-party-harm}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-party-harm
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_party_harm (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_party_harm"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_people_incompetent {#sec-trust-q-people-incompetent}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-people-incompetent
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_people_incompetent (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_people_incompetent"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_eu_longterm {#sec-trust-q-eu-longterm}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-eu-longterm
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_eu_longterm (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_eu_longterm"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_eu_responsive {#sec-trust-q-eu-responsive}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-eu-responsive
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_eu_responsive (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_eu_responsive"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_eu_imp_nat_econ {#sec-trust-q-eu-imp-nat-econ}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-eu-imp-nat-econ
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_eu_imp_nat_econ (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_eu_imp_nat_econ"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_eu_imp_nat_cul {#sec-trust-q-eu-imp-nat-cul}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-eu-imp-nat-cul
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_eu_imp_nat_cul (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_eu_imp_nat_cul"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_eu_imp_nat_pol {#sec-trust-q-eu-imp-nat-pol}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-eu-imp-nat-pol
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_eu_imp_nat_pol (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_eu_imp_nat_pol"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_eu_abolish {#sec-trust-q-eu-abolish}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-eu-abolish
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_eu_abolish (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_eu_abolish"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_eu_satisfaction {#sec-trust-q-eu-satisfaction}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-eu-satisfaction
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_eu_satisfaction (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_eu_satisfaction"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_rural_urban {#sec-trust-q-rural-urban}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-rural-urban
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile by q_rural_urban (Trust): per-level subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (blue); grey bars show per-level counts."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_rural_urban"
levs <- sort(unique(m_trust[[mod]]))
rows <- list()
for (lev in levs) {
  sel <- m_trust[[mod]] == lev
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(lev)]] <- tibble(
    level = as.character(lev),
    n = sum(sel),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = as.character(levs)),
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  )
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.12 * diff(yr) else 0.5
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- if (diff(yr) > 0) 0.20 * diff(yr) else 0.5
cate <- cate |> mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (n / max(n)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = level)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = level, y = floor_y, yend = bar_top),
    colour = "grey80",
    linewidth = 4
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), colour = "#0072B2") +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

### q_edu_age_stop {#sec-trust-q-edu-age-stop}

```{r}
#| label: fig-grf-trust-q-edu-age-stop
#| fig-cap: "GRF CATE of the Muslim profile across deciles of q_edu_age_stop (Trust): per-bin subset ATE with honest cluster-robust 95% CI (ribbon); grey histogram shows the covariate distribution."
#| dpi: 500
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4
mod <- "q_edu_age_stop"
col <- m_trust[[mod]]
bin <- ntile(col, 10)
rows <- list()
for (k in sort(unique(bin))) {
  sel <- bin == k
  a <- grf::average_treatment_effect(cf_trust, subset = sel)
  rows[[as.character(k)]] <- tibble(
    bin = k,
    x_pos = mean(col[sel]),
    estimate = a["estimate"],
    se = a["std.err"]
  )
}
cate <- bind_rows(rows) |>
  mutate(lower = estimate - 1.96 * se, upper = estimate + 1.96 * se)
# distribution band
yr <- range(c(cate$lower, cate$upper))
pad <- 0.12 * diff(yr)
floor_y <- yr[1] - pad
span <- 0.20 * diff(yr)
h <- hist(col[!is.na(col)], breaks = 30, plot = FALSE)
hd <- tibble(mid = h$mids, w = diff(h$breaks)[1], cnt = h$counts) |>
  mutate(bar_top = floor_y + (cnt / max(cnt)) * span)
ggplot(cate, aes(x = x_pos)) +
  geom_rect(
    data = hd,
    aes(xmin = mid - w / 2, xmax = mid + w / 2, ymin = floor_y, ymax = bar_top),
    fill = "grey80",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2, fill = "#0072B2") +
  geom_line(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(y = estimate), colour = "#0072B2", size = 1.5) +
  labs(title = paste0("CATE by ", mod), x = mod, y = yl) +
  ggpubr::theme_pubr()
```

# Session Info {#sec-session-info .appendix .unnumbered}

```{r}
#| label: session-info
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
session_info()
```

# Execution Time {#sec-exec-time .appendix .unnumbered}

```{r}
#| label: exec-time
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
#| include: true
end_time <- Sys.time()
exec_time <- end_time - start_time
cat(paste(
  "R code execution time:",
  round(as.numeric(exec_time, units = "secs"), 2),
  "seconds."
))
```
